query:
SELECT 
  g.phase,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.teamAId) as unique_teamA,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.teamBId) as unique_teamB,
  COUNT(*) as game_count,
  g.tournamentId
FROM games g
WHERE g.phase IS NOT NULL 
  AND g.phase != '' 
  AND g.phase NOT LIKE 'group_%' 
  AND g.phase != 'group_stage'
  AND g.teamAId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY g.tournamentId, g.phase
ORDER BY g.tournamentId, g.phase
LIMIT 20;

SELECT

  COUNT(DISTINCT g.teamAId) as unique_teamA,
  COUNT(DISTINCT g.teamBId) as unique_teamB,
  COUNT(*) as game_count,
  g.tournamentId
FROM games g
WHERE g.phase IS NOT NULL 
  AND g.phase != '' 
  AND g.phase NOT LIKE 'group_%' 
  AND g.phase != 'group_stage'
  AND g.teamAId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY g.tournamentId, g.phase
